description: LLM provider routing for pmxtrader agents. Budget-friendly defaults (~$30-50/credit).

grok.notes: Fast Scout scans. Uses XAI_API_KEY or existing xai-oauth in Hermes.

openai.notes: Cheap Trader command prep. Needs OPENAI_API_KEY.

default.notes: Hermes default from ~/.hermes/config.yaml (your Grok OAuth today).

cliFallback.claude: claude -p (Claude Code CLI if no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
